feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Twin Flames
entry.summary:
Author: isleofthewesternocean (backintimeforstuff)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,535Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 13

Summary: When Kilgharrah lays waste to Camelot, Prince Arthur's magic is stirred from somewhere deep within him. In amongst the attack, and King Uther's new-found hell-bent rage, Merlin supposes he should have seen it coming that the reverse side of his coin would also be able to wield the power of the Old Religion. 2x13 The Last Dragonlord AU.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,158Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Long ago, humans and the Ezakis fought a war that nearly destroyed both races. At Lake Avalon, their kings finally swore peace before the sacred sword in stone, beginning the Age of Hazar. Years later, Uther Pendragon rose to power and shattered that peace. Desperate, humanity turned to Lake Avalon once more. The lake revealed Magic, and a colossal wall was raised between humans and the Ezakis. The spell could never break, the gate could never open, and humanity’s secret had to remain hidden. Yet another power was born that day—Merlin. — “You bring only chaos,” Merlin said. “You’ll never reach that library or that lake.” Arthur laughed and stepped closer. “Your kind only knows how to kneel, Merlin. Have you ever knelt before anyone?” Merlin’s blue eyes shone in the torchlight, fearless. Instead, he smiled. “No,” he whispered. “But if you want to show me…” Magic stirred beneath his skin. “Then don’t hesitate to try.” And in that moment, only one thing was certain: Someone would kneel. Neither of them yet knew who it would be.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.summary:

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,300Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,349Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 89

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

entry.title: Professor Emrys
entry.summary:
Author: Sophthenerd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,837Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 349

Summary: What if Merlin was best friends with the Marauders but left for an internship just after school ended. What happens when he returns years later and learns what happened to his friends while he was gone.This is my first fic so it might be a little choppy. For some context all 5 seasons of Merlin are canon in this and this takes place while Merlin is waiting for Arthur to rise from the lake of Avalon. Books one and two of Harry Potter are the same and the story starts off just before book three.

entry.title: The Prince, The Warlock & The Healer
entry.summary:
Author: Heratakescamelot

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,454Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Hera was just looking for a way to escape her master's thesis and, more generally, the impending collapse of her adult life. She didn't expect the universe to take her so literally that it would hurl her straight into the Sixth Century. Trading academic deadlines for Uther Pendragon’s executioner's block was a trauma, but at least no one in Camelot is asking her if she’s finished her bibliography yet. Hidden away in Gaius’s chambers, Hera tries to navigate a world of ancient stones and fierce laws, where she quickly discovers she isn't just an intruder: she is the catalyst uncovering the unspeakable desires that bind Arthur Pendragon and Merlin to one another.

entry.title: There's only 24 hours (and that's not enough, to lie like you lie, or love like you love)
entry.summary:
Author: ChipInABag

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,107Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 852

Summary: “Merlin was too driven by grief for his other half that he turned back time, but magic like this always has a price. For Merlin to turn back time he had to give up his memories of that time.” Or, merlin resets time to the day he enters Camelot and meets Arthur and looses his memories, but everyone and I mean EVERYONE remembers the past timeline Or, the time travel fix it trope but merlin is the only one who doesn’t know about the past lifetime. (Ignore that Chapter 4 is actually Chapter 3, i’ll fix it when I get the chance.) Thank you for my Beta Reader (And Sibling) @Ntytab Here on Ao3

entry.title: don't panic
entry.summary:
Author: JustAnotherRogueSelkie

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,358Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 5

Summary: The Great Plan. Destiny. Fate. Call it what you will, there are certain people it's taken a shine to over the years. Amongst those people, this is generally seen as a Very Bad Thing. Arthur's returned, and while Merlin's delighted about that, he does know what it means. He's been hoping it wasn't going to be for a good long time, though. Things have been nice. They've been settling into life in New York, where Merlin has been working as a forensic pathologist for the NYPD. They've even found community - a bunch of mad vigilante types who remind him, just a little, of the knights. Merlin hasn't felt this part of something in, well, it's been a while. Then he has to go and run into an old friend summoned and then trapped in a circle by bloody amateurs trying to conjure up something to help them with their Daredevil problem. Now it seems the world's ending. Again, apparently. (You don’t need to know all the fandoms, any context needed is obvious in the story. Feel free to ask questions in the comments if there's anything you don't get!)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Smith, Pendragon & Pendragon
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,248Chapters: 3/8Kudos: 9

Summary: By the time Merlin stepped out of the elevator and into the lobby of Smith, Pendragon & Pendragon, he was already regretting every decision that had led him there. Merlin probably should have left the building immediately. Instead, he tightened his grip on the briefcase and headed toward the elevators. Because somewhere between Gaius getting sick and Will making that deal, common sense had apparently abandoned him entirely.

entry.title: the ways of the old, old winds blowin' back round
entry.summary:
Author: habituallywastingtime

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,526Chapters: 4/16Kudos: 60

Summary: As a child, Arthur didn’t know why he was kept away from the courtyard. Or why it so often smelt… like that. Until one morning, Sir Kay guided him to the balcony he’d only been allowed on sometimes. Only sometimes, because it looks over the courtyard. His father was waiting for him, holding an arm out to beckon him closer. Arthur rushed in, latching himself onto his father’s side as it was so rarely permitted. There was a crowd below him; he had never seen so many people in one place. There was a pile of wood. He remembers little outside of the way his eyes burned, how he at last understood that smell. He remembers forcing down his supper that night and emptying his stomach in the corridor before he could even reach his room. Now he remembers it all. He can’t feel the bruising stones under his knees, hardly tastes the leftover bile coating his mouth. All he knows is the all-consuming realization that his greatest fear and anguish still holds the throne, even in his heart.  sequel to the pale morning sings of forgotten things

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The Dawn of Destiny
entry.summary:
Author: WhisperedPages819

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,424Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Maryana returns to Camelot alive—but survival has a cost. Her escape from captivity leaves the court shaken, the king fearful, and the city bristling with suspicion. Old alliances strain under the weight of secrets, and the laws against magic tighten even as something ancient stirs beyond the castle walls. Hidden within Camelot is a boy the world was never meant to find. His presence bends fate in subtle, dangerous ways—drawing attention from forces that do not yet understand what they have awakened. As Arthur is pulled between loyalty and justice, and Morgana begins to walk a darker, more deliberate path, Maryana is forced to confront a truth she has spent years avoiding: destiny cannot be outrun—only challenged. Because when the old world begins to fracture, the dawn does not arrive gently.And some futures demand to be fought for.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,863Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 126

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,763Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 47

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
